source_jobs.title: Lab Technician (San Francisco)
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



Location & Hours:
This is an in-office in our South San Francisco, CA location.

Working Hours: Tuesday - Saturday, 7 pm - 3 am.

Plasmidsaurus will confirm the working hours before an offer of employment, but candidates should be aware of the non-traditional schedule upon applying to the role.



Additional Details:

This position is open to candidates who are legally authorized to work in the U.S. for the duration of employment. We are unable to provide sponsorship or transfer of sponsorship.



POSITION OVERVIEW

Our Lab Technicians play a crucial role in our laboratory operations, focusing on the accurate and efficient execution of DNA library preparation and sequencing. You’re the one bringing results to the customers that speed up their work and discoveries! Lab Technicians are responsible for preparing samples, operating sequencing equipment, and ensuring the integrity of data. Your job duties will include:

 - Sample Preparation: Prepare and troubleshoot DNA samples for sequencing, adjusting reagent combinations as needed.

 - Instrument Operation: Operate and maintain sequencing and liquid handling instruments; monitor performance and troubleshoot issues.

 - Results Analysis: Review sequencing output, perform quality control, and conduct basic data analysis; collaborate with bioinformaticians for data interpretation.

 - Compliance and Documentation: Follow safety protocols and maintain accurate documentation.

 - Team Collaboration: Foster a culture of innovation and collaboration, encouraging experimentation and the adoption of cutting-edge sequencing technology.

 - Logistic Responsibilities: Work hand in hand with our worldwide logistics team, coordinate with our logistics partners, and supply customers with shipping consumables, ensuring their timely and successful delivery to our lab.

QUALIFICATIONS

 - Lab Experience: Minimum of 2 years of hands-on experience with DNA extraction, purification, and/or sequencing techniques in a commercial lab is required.

 - Problem Solver: Creative problem solver who can dig into an issue and figure out ways to resolve it.

 - Lifelong Learner: Curious and committed to continuous learning and staying updated on the latest scientific trends.

 - Detail-Oriented & Organized: Meticulous attention to detail and ability to stay organized while working on multiple projects at a time.

 - Proactive: Self-starter with a proactive attitude and the ability to work independently.

 - Communication: Excellent communication skills with strong interpersonal skills and the ability to clearly communicate ideas to people across lab locations.

Physical requirements: Must be able to sit and stand for long periods of time. Must be able to frequently lift, carry, push, pull or otherwise move objects and inventory in the lab. Requires substantial movements of the wrists, hands, and/or fingers. Requires

source_jobs.title: Platform Engineering Lead (AI Infra)
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



Position Overview

Technical lead + manager for the compute, data, AI, and security infrastructure that runs our sequencing operation.

You will:

 - Own core services that orchestrate lab devices (robots, sequencers, on-prem Linux servers) and the data ingestion pipeline

 - Build cloud infrastructure and data pipelines to house, process, and deliver terabytes of sequencing data

 - Design infrastructure to orchestrate millions of bioinformatics tasks (queues, workflow orchestration, scheduling)

 - Build AI infrastructure and internal tooling to enable agentic systems:
   
   - Quality Scientist Agents - monitor operations end-to-end, surface anomalies, and intervene/escalate when quality or reliability issues appear
   
   - Logistics Agents - coordinate drivers around the world to move packages to labs and carriers
   
   - Bioinformatics Coding Agents - long-running agents for adaptive analysis of diverse sample types with unknown/shifting data distributions

Culture

You are someone who:

 - Enjoys high agency and high ownership work

 - Can lead ambiguous, cross-functional projects from idea to production

 - Is curious about learning from other people’s expertise in scientific/biological domains

 - Is excited to make an impact on the scientific community

 - Is a life-long learner

 - Is excited to work in a tight-knit fast-paced environment with a motivated team

 - Values clear communication, mentorship, and helping others learn new skills

 - Excited about building on the bleeding edge

Qualifications

 - BS in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Math, Physics or technical subject

 - 7+ years of industry experience (or equivalent)

 - Prior experience leading projects and mentoring engineers (people or technical leadership)

 - Experience building LLM/agent systems (tooling, evaluation, safety/permissions, prompt + workflow design)

 - Primarily developing with coding agents in all parts of software lifecycle - design, implementation, test, review

 - Strong experience with REST API best practices (such as OpenAPI) and service-oriented architectures

 - Strong experience with SQL and data modeling in relational databases (postgres)

 - Strong experience with Python backend services (e.g., Flask/Django/FastAPI)

 - Strong experience working in AWS for containerized task orchestration (Lambda, ECS, Batch, StepFunctions)

 - Experience with infrastructure-as-code tools, like Terraform or AWS CDK

 - Experience building distributed systems with task queues (such as Celery and SQS)

 - Experience working with Linux servers (systemd services, basic networking, application deployment tools like ansible)

 - Comfort operating production systems: incident response, debugging, performance, reliability

 - Desire to learn about DNA sequencing bioinformatics algorithms and workflows

We encourage you to apply even if your experi

source_jobs.title: Head of Logistics
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Plasmidsaurus is seeking a Head of Logistics to build and lead our global logistics function through its next stage of growth. The ideal leader will combine strategic vision for the future with a willingness to roll up their sleeves and support day-to-day operations.



The Head of Logistics will develop systems, build partnerships, and lead a high-performing team that enables global launches and exceptional customer experiences. Success in this role will mean that Plasmidsaurus’ logistics function is a proactive, data-driven operation that is fast, compliant, and built to scale: shipments move seamlessly across both first-mile routes and global borders, risks are anticipated, and turnaround times continually improve.




IN THIS ROLE, YOU WILL:

 - Develop and lead the global logistics function, supporting thousands of international shipments each week and coordinating across regions, time zones, and regulatory environments.

 - Design logistics systems that minimize delays, reduce costs, and enhance reliability for moving biological materials and that scale alongside global launches and company growth.

 - Ensure business continuity, developing contingency plans for day-to-day and emergency scenarios, building redundancy and sustainability into our logistics playbooks.

 - Develop and enforce global compliance and regulatory processes, including import/export, customs management, and relevant material handling standards.

 - Establish tools and dashboards to monitor shipment status, turnaround times, and key performance metrics, using data and metrics to proactively identify risks and opportunities.

 - Collaborate with sales and marketing, operations, product, customer success, and finance to forecast demand, support new services and market launches, and anticipate logistical challenges.

 - Evaluate and optimize courier and carrier relationships, driving improvements around cost, service and reliability in both first-mile planning and international shipping.

 - Build and manage a high-performing logistics team, cultivating a culture of accountability and collaboration in support of our customers.
   
   


YOU SHOULD BRING:

 - 10+ years of logistics or supply chain experience, including proven success managing international logistics or shipping and first-mile transport providers.

 - Experience shipping biological or temperature-sensitive materials within biotech, life sciences, or healthcare logistics.

 - Strong understanding of customs, import/export regulations, and compliance frameworks (IATA, DOT, FDA, or similar).

 - Demonstrated success building scalable, data-driven logistics systems that improve speed, efficiency, and reliability.

 - Proficiency in data analysis and logistics reporting tools, with a track record of implementing software solutions that result in measurable performance.

 - Team lead

source_jobs.title: Lab Robotics Engineer
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



As a Lab Robotics Engineer at Plasmidsaurus, you will play a crucial role in automating and optimizing our sample processing pipeline. You'll be directly responsible for developing, deploying, and maintaining automation processes across our global network of labs.



Your responsibilities will span:

 - Writing production-quality Python code to control our robotic platforms, integrating with various lab instruments

 - Designing robotic systems using various hardware components and embedded systems, including Raspberry Pis, Arduinos, and custom-designed electronic & mechanical parts

 - Collaborating with our world-class scientists to productionize new lab protocols, leveraging your expertise in automation to scale and refine these processes

 - Building and managing a fleet of robots and monitoring systems to proactively identify and address issues with robots in the field




CULTURE



You are someone who:

 - Enjoys high agency and high ownership work

 - Is curious about learning from other people’s expertise in scientific/biological domains

 - Is excited to make an impact on the scientific community, enabling the next generation of medicines, biotechnology, and even plant-based-meats!

 - Can lead projects from idea to production independently

 - Is a life-long learner

 - Is excited to work in a tight-knit fast-paced environment with a motivated team

 - Values clear communication and helping others learn new skills




QUALIFICATIONS

 - BS, MS, or PhD in Computer Science, Robotics, Biology, or relevant work experience

 - 3+ years of experience programming in Python (web frameworks like Flask/Django a plus!)

 - Familiarity with molecular biology protocols with 1+ yrs lab experience

 - 1+ years of experience automating, optimizing and scaling lab procedures using liquid handling systems (OpenTrons, Hamilton, etc.) and lab robotics

 - Experience with orchestration and deploying software to multiple devices in the field (e.g. Docker, Ansible)

 - Experience with cloud platforms and infrastructure-as-code (e.g., AWS, Terraform)

 - Experience writing software for Raspberry Pi

 - Experience with building & maintaining QA, telemetry, and monitoring systems to ensure device stability

 - Experience working with Linux servers

 - Experience with 3D printing (e.g., Fusion 360) and basic CAD modeling

 - Some experience with simple computer vision (e.g., OpenCV)

 - (Preferred) Some experience with C# and .NET frameworks for scripting automation equipment

 - (Preferred) interest in learning about biotechnology and DNA sequence analysis




WHY PLASMIDSAURUS?

 - IMPACT: Your work will directly contribute to accelerating biotech research. This research is one of humanity’s most powerful tools for stopping climate change and developing novel therapies.

 - INNOVATION: Work on the cutting edge of biotech and software, introducing

source_jobs.title: Revenue Operations Manager
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.

 


ROLE OVERVIEW

 

Plasmidsaurus is hiring a Revenue Operations Manager to help scale the systems, data infrastructure, and intelligent workflows that power our commercial organization.

You will build the integrated data and automation infrastructure with a focus on AI enablement that allows the Plasmidsaurus sales and marketing teams to operate at a higher level. You will ensure Account Managers, Customer Success managers, Inside Sales reps and Marketing get the data, signals, and tools they need to identify the right accounts, reach those accounts with the right context, and measure what is working.

This is a highly visible, cross-functional role with broad ownership across CRM operations, automation, enrichment, reporting, commercial intelligence, and AI-driven workflow development. The position reports to the VP of Revenue Operations.




WHAT YOU’LL DO




BUILD COMMERCIAL OPERATIONS INFRASTRUCTURE

 - Design, develop, and scale the workflows, systems, integrations, and governance processes that power the commercial organization.

 - Build CRM enrichment, deduplication, account hygiene, and data quality processes that improve operational efficiency and reporting reliability.

 - Develop account tiering, segmentation, and classification automation to support scalable GTM planning and execution.

 - Identify operational bottlenecks and improve workflows that help field teams spend more time with customers and less time managing data.

 - Maintain and evolve commercial systems, enrichment cadences, and reporting infrastructure as the company scales.


IMPLEMENT AI, AUTOMATION & COMMERCIAL INTELLIGENCE

 - Build and deploy AI-enabled workflows that improve commercial productivity, prioritization, and decision-making.

 - Develop LLM-powered account summaries, contact intelligence, signal scoring, and agentic business development support workflows.

 - Create proactive alerting systems for expansion signals, churn risk, publications, funding announcements, hiring activity, and other commercial triggers.

 - Evaluate emerging AI and automation tools that can improve speed, insight generation, and customer engagement.


IMPROVE COMMERCIAL VISIBILITY & DECISION-MAKING

 - Create self-serve dashboards and reporting that help field teams and commercial leadership understand account health, pipeline performance, and growth opportunities.

 - Build reporting around account tier coverage, product attach rates, pipeline velocity, geographic performance, RNA-seq sample growth, repeat order behavior, and customer engagement.

 - Develop automated MBR and QBR data packages for commercial leadership.

 - Support forecasting, territory planning, segmentation, and strategic business reviews.


EXPECTED OUTCOMES (3–12 MONTHS)

90 Days

 - Complete a CRM and commercial systems assessment baseline.

 - Create development project plan after assessme

source_jobs.title: Strategic Talent Partner, Technical Sourcing
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



ROLE OVERVIEW

Exceptional engineers rarely come through inbound applications. They come through relationships, trusted networks, and a strong reputation.

Plasmidsaurus has built an exceptional engineering team through referrals, relationships, and highly selective hiring. We're looking for a technically-oriented sourcer to help turn that advantage into a durable talent engine.

In this role, you'll identify outstanding technical talent before we need it, build relationships that last for years, and help ensure Plasmidsaurus is known by the engineers we'd most want to hire. You'll partner closely with engineering leadership to understand what great looks like, map the talent landscape, and create networks that compound over time.

Success isn't measured by outreach volume or pipeline size. It's measured by whether we know exceptional people before anyone else does, whether they take our call when the time is right, and whether those relationships become the foundation of future hires.




WHAT YOU'LL DO



FIND EXCELLENT PEOPLE WE DON'T ALREADY KNOW

Partner with engineering leaders to understand what exceptional looks like and find people we would never meet through inbound applications, traditional recruiting channels, or existing networks.

Map the companies, teams, and communities producing exceptional engineers and build targeted strategies to reach them.




BUILD RELATIONSHIPS BEFORE WE NEED THEM

Develop relationships with exceptional technical talent long before a role exists.

Stay connected through conversations, introductions, referrals, events, and communities so that when hiring needs emerge, we're building activating via relationships rather than starting from scratch.



EXPAND OUR TALENT NETWORK

Continuously grow Plasmidsaurus' reach into engineering communities, open source ecosystems, startup networks, and other places exceptional builders spend time.

Help make Plasmidsaurus known by the people we'd most want to hire.



CREATE TALENT ADVANTAGES THAT COMPOUND

Build systems, workflows, talent maps, and sourcing approaches that become more valuable over time.

Use automation, AI, and creative research methods to increase leverage, improve outcomes, and strengthen our understanding of the market.




EXPECTED OUTCOMES

 - We know exceptional engineers before we need them.

 - Engineering leaders have access to talent they would not have found through traditional recruiting channels.

 - We can activate trusted relationships when critical hiring needs emerge.

 - Our talent network generates introductions, referrals, insight, and future hiring opportunities.

 - We have a strong understanding of where exceptional talent comes from, where it's going, and what it cares about.

 - Engineering leaders use market insight to make better hiring decisions.

 - Exceptional engineers know who we are, understand what we're bu

source_jobs.title: Sales Account Manager (Mid-Atlantic)
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



This position requires 50%+ travel, primarily in the MidAtlantic region. Candidates must be located in the greater New York city, New Jersey or Philadelphia region.



Your Role

The Sales Account Manager will play a pivotal role in driving revenue growth and expanding our market share in the sequencing industry across the Mid Atlantic territory. This position requires a deep understanding of sequencing technologies, exceptional sales skills, and the ability to build and maintain strong relationships with key clients. The ideal candidate will be a proven operator who thinks strategically about a book of business and brings a proven track record of meeting or exceeding sales targets.



We're looking for someone:

 - Who has experience selling to Academic, Biotech, and Government accounts and 5+ years of relevant experience directly in the sequencing industry.

 - With a proven track record of success in account management, exceeding targets and driving revenue growth.

 - Who has strong familiarity with most common Sequencing, Synthetic Biology, cell and gene therapies, and molecular biology lab techniques.

 - Who can identify and pursue new business opportunities, generate leads, and convert them into successful sales through a consultative approach.

 - Who has a demonstrated history of devising and implementing successful strategies utilizing a consultative approach in customer interactions, resulting in measurable and impactful outcomes.

 - Who has negotiation skills, both in written and oral communication, coupled with presentation abilities. Proven track record of collaborating seamlessly with key stakeholders across internal and external organizations.

 - Proficient in maintaining and organizing opportunity pipelines, tasks, and events using CRM tools such as Hubspot, Salesforce, or similar platforms. 

 - Who has excellent interpersonal skills with the ability to build and maintain strong relationships with clients and internal teams.

 - Who has a strong track record of both finding and closing new opportunities and being able to maintain current customer relationships.

 - Who is self-motivated with a strong drive for results.

 - Who has a Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (e.g., Biology, Biotechnology, Life Sciences).
   
   

This is a remote position; however, applicants must reside in New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania or North Carolina.



Working Conditions/ Schedule

 - Requires the ability and willingness to travel within the assigned territory for customer meetings, internal business gatherings, seminars, and conferences. Additionally, occasional travel outside of the assigned territory may be expected.

source_jobs.title: HR Generalist
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



About the Role

We are looking for a highly motivated and systems-minded HR Generalist to own the workflows and tooling that keep our team running. You will be the internal expert on our people systems, the operational backbone behind payroll, benefits, and compliance, and the person who makes sure every employee — whether in South San Francisco, another US state, or an international entity — has a seamless experience from Day 1. This is an individual contributor role which will require you to operate with a high degree of autonomy, pay excellent attention to detail, and collaborate across company functions.



What You'll Do

 - Own Rippling end-to-end: payroll, benefits administration, onboarding/offboarding workflows, app provisioning, and automations

 - Run multi-state and international payroll, including coordination with local providers and PEOs for global team members

 - Keep us compliant across all US states — registrations, local leave laws, required postings, and reporting — and help manage compliance requirements for our international entities

 - Support employee visa and immigration processes as the internal coordinator and employee-facing point of contact

 - Administer benefits day-to-day and own open enrollment end-to-end

 - Manage employment documentation across FTEs, contractors, and international workers

 - Deliver a tight onboarding experience and own the full employee lifecycle in our systems
   
   

What We're Looking For

 - 3–5 years in HR, People Ops, or a similar role, ideally at a scaling startup

 - Expert-level Rippling experience — you've helped own it, not just used it

 - Multi-state payroll and compliance experience; California is a strong plus

 - Experience coordinating visa and immigration cases with outside counsel

 - Comfort navigating international entities and varied employment models

 - Highly autonomous, detail-obsessed, and a clear communicator

 - Excellent decision making capability and knows when to seek support or guidance

 - Ashby experience is a plus
   
   

We encourage you to apply even if your experience doesn't perfectly align with the job description as we seek out diverse and creative perspectives. Team members who love to learn and collaborate in an inclusive environment will thrive with us. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. If you need additional accommodations to feel comfortable during your interview process, please let us know at careers@plasmidsaurus.com. careers@plasmidsaurus.com

source_jobs.title: Sr Product Manager | Genomics DNA Sequencing
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



Role Overview


Plasmidsaurus is hiring a Senior Product Manager to define, own, and scale our genomics DNA sequencing services portfolio. You will shape product strategy, drive customer and market insights, and lead cross-functional execution from concept through launch and growth. This role serves as the bridge among R&D, Operations, Marketing, and Revenue, ensuring we deliver differentiated, high-impact solutions that empower scientific discovery.



What You’ll Do



Understand the market and customer needs

 - Lead customer engagement to identify unmet needs, workflows, and motivations for genomics sequencing applications.

 - Analyze market trends, competitor offerings, and segmentation to inform strategy and prioritization.

 - Serve as the internal voice of the customer for the services and applications in your portfolio.

Own product strategy and roadmap

 - Define and evolve the product roadmap for genomics DNA sequencing services.

 - Collaborate across teams to align strategy with technical feasibility and operational readiness.

Drive product lifecycle execution

 - Manage the product lifecycle from ideation through commercial launch and iterative improvement.

 - Lead service pricing and positioning strategy development.

Enable go-to-market and growth

 - Collaborate with Marketing to develop and execute Go-to-Market strategies to drive awareness, adoption, and revenue.

 - Support Revenue teams with tools and narratives that accelerate adoption and growth.

 - Track performance and refine offerings based on customer feedback and business metrics.

Contribute to Product Management function

 - Help build and refine product management frameworks and processes, to improve cross-functional collaboration and efficiency.

Expected Outcomes (6–12 months)

 - Lead customer research for 3 new services, defining customer segmentation, use cases, and key requirements.

 - Launch one or more services starting from the product concept phase.

 - Establish a product roadmap with cross-functional buy-in that drives early revenue and adoption.

 - Collaborate with Go-to-Market teams to enable successful product launch and uptake among target segments.



What You’ll Bring



Experience & Background

 - Minimum of 5 years experience launching products or services in sequencing or related workflows, including managing key technical and business dimensions.

 - Deep understanding of genomics platforms, library prep methods, and associated analysis needs.

 - Proven capability defining product roadmaps, driving cross-functional alignment, and delivering measurable market impact.

 - Experience influencing product direction and revenue growth without direct authority.

Technical Expertise

 - Familiarity with genomics sequencing applications (e.g. whole genome and targeted sequencing, counting applications) and customer workflows.

 - Sol

source_jobs.title: Process Development Scientist
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.




ROLE OVERVIEW

Plasmidsaurus is building new sequencing products that can move from promising science to reliable, high-volume production. As a Process Development Scientist, you will own that transition.

You will identify bottlenecks, failure modes, and scaling challenges in our sequencing workflows—starting with RNA sequencing—and develop practical solutions that make our products faster, more reliable, and easier to operate at scale. Your work will sit at the intersection of R&D and production, helping new technologies become robust production processes.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Lead process development efforts for production-scale sequencing workflows.

 - Identify root causes of process failures and design experiments that improve robustness, throughput, and ease of operation.

 - Partner with Production to reduce failures, decrease technician intervention, and improve workflow efficiency.

 - Work closely with R&D during product development to ensure new products are designed with scale and manufacturability in mind.

 - Drive technology transfer from development into production, helping new products launch smoothly and scale successfully.

 - Collaborate across Product, Bioinformatics, Automation, Production, Commercial, Custom, and Platform teams to solve complex technical problems.

 - Guide the work of Research Associates and Laboratory Technicians as projects require.
   
   


WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE




THE FIRST THREE MONTHS

You understand where our production workflows struggle today and have identified the highest-leverage opportunities for improvement.

You've already implemented meaningful process improvements that reduce failures, simplify operations, or improve turnaround time. Production teams feel supported and have greater confidence in the processes they run every day.




WITHIN SIX MONTHS

Several process improvements are in production and delivering measurable results. Technology transfers move more smoothly, production issues are identified and resolved faster, and new products are arriving in production with fewer surprises.

You have become a trusted partner to both R&D and Production, helping bridge the gap between development and scale.




WITHIN ONE YEAR

Process development has become a competitive advantage. Production workflows are more reliable, easier to operate, and better prepared for growth.

New products transition into production more efficiently, scaling creates less operational strain, and R&D teams have more capacity to focus on developing the next generation of sequencing products.




WHO YOU ARE

You enjoy solving complex biological systems and thinking from first principles. You care as much about whether a process works at scale as whether it works in a single experiment.

You bring strong molecular biology expertise and experience developing, optimizing, and scaling laboratory pro

source_jobs.title: VP, People
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



The Opportunity


The VP People at Plasmidsaurus will help lead a rapidly growing, category-defining life sciences company with exceptional product-market fit, real and significant growth opportunities. You will shape the people strategy behind innovative technology that allows researchers around the world to move faster on some of society's most important scientific challenges.


Reporting to the CEO and partnering directly with an ambitious founding team and company leadership, you will architect the organizational structure, develop the leadership bench, and build the people systems required to power a rapidly growing startup as we expand internationally, launch new products, enter new markets, and deepen strategic partnerships. We’re looking for a leader who has seen similar growth stages with a founder-led business, who has successfully built international teams and operating structures, and who has implemented people programs that enable growth without sacrificing performance, compliance, or execution quality.


Great candidates will bring not just HR leadership, but also strong business judgment and strategic thinking. They will contribute meaningfully to discussions that extend beyond traditional People topics. The strongest candidates will be as comfortable debating organizational strategy, growth plans, and business tradeoffs as they are leading people function.



The Role

Build the leadership, organizational, and management foundations that enable Plasmidsaurus to scale globally while remaining fast, accountable, and operationally excellent.

As we grow in complexity, geography, and headcount, the VP, People will ensure our leadership capability, organizational effectiveness, workforce governance, and global people infrastructure evolve to support the company's ambitions.

Responsibilities



Organizational & Leadership Development

 - Partner with the CEO and leadership team on organizational design, leadership development, succession planning, and workforce strategy.

 - Develop managers and leaders across the company and help raise the overall quality of leadership.

 - Serve as a trusted advisor on organizational, leadership, management, and workforce-related decisions.



People Strategy & Operations

 - Own and develop the People function, including HR business partnership, people operations, employee relations, compensation and benefits, performance management, compliance, and workforce planning.

 - Partner closely with our Talent team to ensure hiring, onboarding, leadership development, performance management, workforce planning, and retention strategies work together to strengthen the organization over time.

 - Build the systems, processes, tools, and operating mechanisms required to support a rapidly growing and increasingly complex business.

 - Build and lead a high-performing People team that scales along

source_jobs.title: Senior Product Manager | Plasmid Sequencing
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.

Plasmidsaurus is hiring a Senior Product Manager to help manage our flagship plasmid sequencing portfolio. This is a dream role for someone looking to improve and accelerate molecular biology research. You’ll be instrumental in helping us unleash the next wave of our groundbreaking sequencing services, as well as in building and defining how Product functions at Plasmidsaurus. This role will serve as the glue between R&D, Sales, Marketing, Engineering, and Operations, and will ensure that we continue to deliver the kind of game-changing products our customers have come to expect from us.



What You’ll Do

 - Understand the market. Engage with customers, uncover unmet needs, analyze trends, track competitors, and serve as the internal voice of the customer.

 - Own product strategy. Define roadmaps, conduct market research, build business cases, and collaborate across teams to drive business impact.

 - Build amazing things. Partner with R&D to manage the product lifecycle from concept through beta testing to commercial launch.

 - Drive growth. Advance strategies to generate revenue from existing services.

 - Make our value clear. Work with Product Marketing to develop go-to-market plans, campaigns, and sales enablement tools that build awareness, generate leads, and empower the Sales team.

 - Help shape the Product Management function. Build frameworks, processes, and resources that improve team efficiency.



What You’ll Bring to the Team

 - Deep knowledge of modern cloning techniques including Gibson assembly, Golden Gate and Gateway cloning, and gene synthesis approaches.

 - Extensive experience with molecular biology techniques (plasmid/primer design, PCR, transformation, nucleic acid extraction), analysis tools (SnapGene, Benchling, ApE, Geneious), and functional genomics experimental designs such as loss- and gain-of-function screens.

 - A minimum of 5 years’ experience launching products or services that deliver clear customer value, including managing the full workflow from sample preparation through data analysis.

 - Proven ability to drive revenue from established products through pricing, positioning, and promotional strategies

 - Experience influencing and collaborating effectively with customers and internal teams to drive successful outcomes.

 - Expertise in building product roadmaps and managing the full product lifecycle.

 - Creative problem-solving skills with a focus on customer impact.

 - Advanced degree in molecular biology, genetics, or related field (PhD preferred)

 - Outstanding leadership, teamwork, and communication skills.




EXPECTED OUTCOMES (6-12 MONTHS)

 - Customer Insights: Lead research efforts to understand customer segmentation, applications, motivations, behaviors, and unmet needs, providing insights that guide product strategy and prioritization.

 - Market Impact: Implement strategic

source_jobs.title: Bioinformatics Scientist
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



Position Overview

You'll work on the bioinformatics engine powering that impact, wearing many hats:

 - Building blazing-fast, production-grade bioinformatics workflows that process thousands of samples per day.

 - Developing novel algorithms that turn raw sequencing data into fast, intuitive, and accurate insights.

 - Staying on top of cutting-edge tools and finding creative ways to integrate them into real-world pipelines.

 - Hunting down bugs and taming the chaos of real-world sequencing data — biological artifacts, platform quirks, and all.

 - Translating bioinformatics outputs into dynamic scientific UX that feels magical to researchers.

 - Mentoring teammates and growing your own skills in a fast-moving, collaborative environment.

Culture

You are someone who:

 - Thrives with high agency and high ownership — you lead projects from idea to production.

 - Is curious about the intersection of biology, algorithms, and software engineering.

 - Gets excited knowing your work directly accelerates the next generation of medicines and biotechnology.

 - Values clear communication and loves helping others level up.

 - Is energized by a tight-knit, fast-paced team environment.



Qualifications

PhD in a quantitative field (Bioinformatics, Computer Science, Statistics, or Physics) plus 3+ years building production bioinformatics pipelines.

Required:

 - Deep expertise in at least one of: microbial genomics (assembly/metagenomics), variant calling / large-scale genomics, or bulk/single-cell RNA-seq.

 - Significant experience with production Nextflow or Snakemake pipelines, including cloud deployments.

 - Strong understanding of core sequence analysis principles — alignment, assembly, and beyond.

 - Solid molecular biology foundation and hands-on experience with Illumina or Oxford Nanopore sequencing.

 - Proficiency in Python (numpy, pandas, biopython, Jupyter) and conda-based package management.

 - Docker / Apptainer / Singularity, Git + GitHub.

 - Experience building intuitive web tools for bioinformatics analysis.

 - Linux shell scripting and ability to write clean, production-ready code.

 - Experience with large-scale genomic data processing and storage.

Preferred:

 - Performant software in a compiled language (C++, Rust, etc.).

 - Strong interest in data visualization for scientific UX.

 - 1+ year of biology wetlab experience.

 - Track record developing novel bioinformatics algorithms.

We encourage you to apply even if your experience doesn't perfectly align with the job description as we seek out diverse and creative perspectives. Team members who love to learn and collaborate in an inclusive environment will thrive with us. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or di

source_jobs.title: Lead Product Designer
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.




THE ROLE

We are hiring a Lead Product Designer to own the user experience from order to results. You will work with our product engineers, bioinformaticians and scientists on the next big thing in biology.



What you’ll do:

 - Own the end-to-end product experience from ordering through sequencing results and raise the bar on every screen you touch.

 - Establish a design system for our UI and data visualization. You will focus on the sequencing results experience where most of our value reaches the customer.

 - Work with our engineers and bioinformaticians to turn complex workflows into intuitive software that makes the user think “why did this not exist before?”
   
   


WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

 - You have a portfolio that shows range and craft. We want to see things that have made it to production.

 - A track record of operating semi-autonomously: ideally as a founding designer, senior IC, design lead, or similar role where the design decisions were yours to make and live with.

 - You can ramp fast in technical domains. We don’t require a science background, but you should be energized by complexity and willing to learn.
   
   


WHAT WOULD IMPRESS US EVEN MORE

 - You are comfortable wearing the PM hat occasionally and making sure our user experience is reflected in product decisions.

 - You have experience designing for a deep technical domain or complex data visualizations.

 - You got obsessed with a problem and built something to solve it, even though nobody asked you to.
   
   


WHAT WE OFFER

 - We are a bootstrapped, profitable company at an exciting inflection point.

 - Ownership and impact. Your work goes directly to 70,000 scientists, including Nobel laureates, who trust Plasmidsaurus with their research.

 - A tower office in South San Francisco with bay views, state-of-the-art lab, and the occasional batch of liquid nitrogen ice cream.
   
   

We encourage you to apply even if your experience doesn't perfectly align with the job description as we seek out diverse and creative perspectives. Team members who love to learn and collaborate in an inclusive environment will thrive with us. We are an equal opportunity employer and do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, veteran status, or disability status. If you need additional accommodations to feel comfortable during your interview process, please let us know at careers@plasmidsaurus.com. careers@plasmidsaurus.com

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.

Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



Product Management leads the direction of our product portfolio, ensuring that what we build fits real customer needs, stands out in the market, and supports company goals. We connect strategy to execution, including owning product strategy and guiding the full product lifecycle.



Role Overview



Plasmidsaurus is hiring a Senior Product Manager who will define, own, and scale our Transcriptomics portfolio, including our recently launched and rapidly growing RNA-seq service. You will shape strategy, drive customer and market insight, and lead the development and launch of new transcriptomics applications, working in close partnership with Marketing and Revenue.

This role will expand RNA-seq beyond traditional gene expression use cases, leveraging speed and cost advantages to enable differentiated applications in areas such as cell line QC, cellular phenotyping, and differentiation state assessment. This is a senior individual contributor role with broad cross-functional influence.



What You’ll Do




UNDERSTAND THE MARKET AND CUSTOMER

 - Lead research to understand customer segments, workflows, unmet needs, and decision drivers.

 - Analyze market dynamics, competitive offerings, and emerging applications in RNA-seq and related assays.

 - Translate customer insight into clear product requirements and prioritization frameworks.

 - Serve as the internal voice of the transcriptomics customer.


OWN PRODUCT STRATEGY AND ROADMAP

 - Define and evolve the roadmap for the Transcriptomics portfolio.

 - Manage products from concept and validation through launch and iteration.

 - Identify and develop novel RNA-seq-based applications to advance scientific research.

 - Build business cases that align technical feasibility, operational capability, and commercial opportunity.

 - Ensure cross-functional alignment on roadmap priorities.


ENABLE GO-TO-MARKET AND GROWTH

 - Lead pricing and positioning strategies.

 - Collaborate with Marketing to develop Go-to-Market strategy, define product messaging, execute promotional activities, and enable Revenue teams.

 - Track adoption, customer feedback, and performance metrics to guide iteration.


STRENGTHEN PRODUCT MANAGEMENT FOUNDATIONS

 - Help evolve product management frameworks, documentation standards, and cross-functional processes.

 - Improve roadmap visibility and execution rigor across teams.




EXPECTED OUTCOMES




WITHIN 6 MONTHS:

Customer Insights

 - Deliver clear segmentation and prioritization for transcriptomics customers.

 - Identify and prioritize high-impact applications for RNA-seq expansion.

Product Realization

 - Define and launch at least one new transcriptomics application.

Roadmap Ownership

 - Maintain a clear Transcriptomics product roadmap with cross-functional alignment.

Market Impact

 - Partner with Marketing and Revenue to drive adoption and measurab

source_jobs.title: Lab Technician (Louisville)
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.



Location & Hours:
In-office in Louisville, KY. Tuesday - Saturday, from 12AM-8:30AM EST.



Additional Details:

This position is open to candidates who are legally authorized to work in the U.S. for the duration of employment. We are unable to provide sponsorship or transfer of sponsorship.



POSITION OVERVIEW

Our Lab Technicians play a crucial role in our laboratory operations, focusing on the accurate and efficient execution of DNA library preparation and sequencing. You’re the one bringing results to the customers that speed up their work and discoveries! Lab Technicians are responsible for preparing samples, operating sequencing equipment, and ensuring the integrity of data. Your job duties will include:



 - Sample Preparation: Prepare and troubleshoot DNA samples for sequencing, adjusting reagent combinations as needed

 - Instrument Operation: Operate and maintain sequencing and liquid handling instruments; monitor performance and troubleshoot issues

 - Results Analysis: Review sequencing output, perform quality control, and conduct basic data analysis; collaborate with bioinformaticians for data interpretation

 - Compliance and Documentation: Follow safety protocols and maintain accurate documentation.

 - Team Collaboration: Foster a culture of innovation and collaboration, encouraging experimentation and the adoption of cutting-edge sequencing technology

 - Logistic Responsibilities: Work hand in hand with our worldwide logistics team, coordinate with our logistics partners, and supply customers with shipping consumables, ensuring their timely and successful delivery to our lab.
   
   

QUALIFICATIONS



 - Lab Experience: Hands-on experience with DNA extraction, purification, and/or sequencing techniques is preferred, but general lab experience or related technical skills are also welcome

 - Problem Solver: Creative problem solver who can dig into an issue and figure out ways to resolve it

 - Lifelong Learner: Curious and committed to continuous learning and staying updated on the latest scientific trends

 - Detail-Oriented & Organized: Meticulous attention to detail and ability to stay organized while working on multiple projects at a time

 - Proactive: Self-starter with a proactive attitude and the ability to work independently.

 - Communication: Excellent communication skills with strong interpersonal skills and the ability to clearly communicate ideas to people across lab locations



Physical requirements: Must be able to sit and stand for long periods of time. Must be able to frequently lift, carry, push, pull or otherwise move objects and inventory in the lab. Requires substantial movements of the wrists, hands, and/or fingers. Requires close visual acuity to perform activities such as: pipetting; viewing a computer terminal; preparing and analyzing data and figures.

#LI-Onsite

We encourage you to app

source_jobs.title: Sales Director, Europe
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.




ROLE OVERVIEW

Europe represents Plasmidsaurus' largest growth opportunity. With laboratories in the UK and Germany and an early-stage commercial organization already in place, the region is at an inflection point. The next phase requires a leader who can scale the team, strengthen execution, deepen customer relationships, and establish Plasmidsaurus as the leading sequencing partner across Europe.

As Sales Director, Europe, you will lead and grow the regional commercial organization, driving durable revenue growth, expanding strategic customer relationships, and building the structure, accountability, and cross-functional coordination required to scale the business. This role is suited for a commercial leader who is excited to start in a player/coach capacity, enjoys building, thrives in ambiguity, and wants to have a direct impact on the growth trajectory of a rapidly scaling genomics company.




THE ROLE

Build the commercial organization, customer relationships, and operating discipline required for Plasmidsaurus to become the leading sequencing partner across Europe.

As Sales Director, Europe, you will lead and grow the regional commercial organization, driving durable revenue growth, expanding strategic customer relationships, and building the systems and accountability required to scale successfully.




WHAT SUCCESS LOOKS LIKE YEAR ONE


We have a stronger commercial organization. The European commercial team operates with the talent, structure, accountability, and operating rigor needed to scale efficiently and consistently deliver results.

Europe is growing faster. The region delivers sustainable and improving revenue growth while expanding Plasmidsaurus' presence across priority markets, customer segments, and product lines.

Our strategic customer relationships are deeper. Key customers and BioPharma accounts view Plasmidsaurus as a trusted partner, creating long-term commercial value and growth opportunities.

We execute with greater discipline. Forecasting is reliable, pipeline management is effective, and commercial performance is measured and managed with clear accountability.

Europe operates as one team. Commercial, marketing, operations, support, and laboratory teams work together effectively across geographies with shared priorities and strong communication.




WHO YOU ARE


You build teams that perform. You know how to hire, develop, coach, and retain exceptional commercial talent. You create accountability, raise standards, and help people do the best work of their careers.

You know how to scale. You have built systems, processes, and operating rhythms that enable growth without sacrificing execution quality. You understand that great businesses are built on both people and discipline.

You are commercially minded. You combine strong business judgment with a deep understanding of sales, customer relations

source_jobs.title: New Product Scientist
source_jobs.description:
About Plasmidsaurus

Plasmidsaurus is on a mission to accelerate new cures and promote a healthier planet by unlocking a new level of productivity for scientists. Our sequencing services are used daily by thousands of innovators, including Nobel laureates, Fortune 100 pharma, and over 70,000 scientists.



We began by revolutionizing plasmid sequencing, making it exponentially cheaper and faster, with innovative sequencing technologies and a global network of laboratories that turn samples into answers in hours, not weeks.



Now we are expanding that same disruptive model across all of genomics. With the launch of our new RNA-seq service, we are taking a bold step toward our vision to sequence everything, providing scientists everywhere with faster, simpler, and more affordable access to the data that powers discovery.



Every team member at Plasmidsaurus plays a crucial role in driving the future of biotech research. Together, we are building the world’s most efficient sequencing engine that operates overnight, scales globally, and helps scientists make breakthroughs faster than ever before.




ROLE OVERVIEW



R&D is the engine behind Plasmidsaurus's long-term growth. As a New Product Scientist, you will help define what RNA sequencing looks like next. Your work will create entirely new capabilities for customers, opening new applications, expanding our product portfolio, and shaping how scientists use sequencing to solve problems.

This is a highly autonomous product development role for a scientist who wants to build, not maintain. You will identify promising opportunities, design and test new approaches, and turn successful concepts into scalable products. The path from idea to customer impact is short, and the best ideas can quickly become products used by scientists around the world.

We're looking for someone who is excited by unanswered questions, moves quickly from hypothesis to experiment, and wants to contribute directly to the technologies that drive Plasmidsaurus' next phase of growth.




WHAT YOU'LL DO




DEVELOP NEW RNA SEQUENCING PRODUCTS

 - Identify and evaluate new RNA sequencing opportunities through literature review, market analysis, and original scientific insight.

 - Design and execute experiments to assess technical feasibility and sequencing performance.

 - Develop and validate new library preparation methods that expand the Plasmidsaurus RNA sequencing portfolio.


SCALE AND PRODUCTIZE

 - Determine which methods can be translated into scalable, automated production processes.

 - Advance successful concepts from proof-of-concept through scaled production-ready workflows.

 - Contribute expertise that helps shape Plasmidsaurus’ product launch process.


COLLABORATE ACROSS THE BUSINESS

 - Partner with Product, Bioinformatics, Production, Automation, Commercial, Platform, Custom, Marketing, UI/UX, and Website teams to bring new products to market.

 - Guide the work of research associates and laboratory technicians when needed.

 - Share product development insights that improve decision-making across the R&D organization.
   
   


EXPECTED OUTCOMES




FIRST 3 MONTHS

 - Identify and prioritize promising new RNA sequencing opportunities within the first two weeks.

 - Demonstrate successful sequencing using a new approach within the first four weeks.

 - Establish a clear path toward a scalable product within seven weeks.

 - Begin scaling a validated workflow within ten weeks.

 - Build strong working relationships with key cross-functional partners.


FIRST 6 MONTHS

 - Advance multiple RNA sequencing concepts through development and validation.

 - Contribute to at least one product launch or product-ready workflow.

 - Demonstrate a repeatable process for evaluating and prioritizing new technical opportunities.

 - Influence product development decisions through technical expertise and scientific judgment.


FIRST YEAR

 - Launch new RNA sequencing products that expand the portfolio.

 -

notes: Highly technical product-focused company with a strong emphasis on genomics and sequencing services.
